---
title: "Alejandro Castellanos"
subtitle: "MSc. Student"
image: ../people-images/alejandro-castellanos.jpeg
about :
  template: jolla
  image: ../people-images/alejandro-castellanos.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/alejandrocs_98
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/alejandrocs98
---
